2605.25360.title: Learning to Route Languages for Multilingual Policy Optimization
2605.25360.paper_summary: Large language models~(LLMs) are trained on heterogeneous multilingual corpora, yet existing policy optimization methods often implicitly restrict each training question to a single response language or rely on a fixed dominant language for supervision. We propose language-routed policy optimization (LRPO), an online policy optimization framework that treats language as a selectable variable. LRPO elicits multilingual rollouts for each training question and integrates their relative quality into preference-based policy updates, increasing the diversity and informativeness of training signals under the fixed rollout budget. To adaptively determine which languages to explore during reinforcement learning, we introduce a trainable language router formulated as a multi-armed bandit, balancing exploration of underutilized languages with exploitation of more informative ones. Extensive experiments show that LRPO consistently improves multilingual performance, demonstrating that adaptive language routing enables effective cross-lingual knowledge exploitation for training. We release all the resources at https://github.com/Guochry/LRPO.
2605.25360.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）是在異質的多語言語料庫上訓練的，但現有的政策優化方法往往隱含地將每個訓練問題限制為單一回應語言，或依賴於固定的主導語言進行監督。我們提出了語言路由政策優化（LRPO），這是一種將語言視為可選變量的在線政策優化框架。LRPO 為每個訓練問題引出多語言的回饋，並將其相對質量整合到基於偏好的政策更新中，從而在固定的回饋預算下增加訓練信號的多樣性和信息量。為了自適應地確定在強化學習過程中探索哪些語言，我們引入了一個可訓練的語言路由器，將其形式化為多臂賭博機，平衡對未充分利用語言的探索與對更具信息量語言的利用。大量實驗表明，LRPO 一直在提高多語言性能，證明自適應語言路由能夠有效地利用跨語言知識進行訓練。我們在 https://github.com/Guochry/LRPO 上釋放所有資源。
2605.25360.author: Geyang Guo et.al.
2605.25360.authors: Geyang Guo, Hiromi Wakaki, Yuki Mitsufuji, Alan Ritter, Wei Xu
